analysis.test: Formal regularity of the saisie-contrefaçon (infringement seizure): (i) prior ex parte order from the […] of the Tribunal Judiciaire (Art. L332-1 French Intellectual Property Code); (ii) proper service of the order upon the party subject to seizure BEFORE or at the time of the operations, with delivery of a separately certified true copy DISTINCT from the procès-verbal (Art. 495 Code of Civil Procedure) — the bailiff's mere recital of prior service is insufficient (Exhibit 11 [adverse party], TGI Paris 4 avril 2014; judgment [1]); (iii) scope of the seizure strictly […] to what the order authorizes; (iv) exclusive presence of authorized persons (bailiff + designated expert, Art. L332-1 para. 3) — any assistance by a representative of the petitioner not expressly authorized constitutes a substantive […] ground rendering the seizure void without any requirement to demonstrate prejudice (judgments [1] and [2]); (v) collection of spontaneous statements conditioned upon prior discovery of allegedly infringing items on the premises (judgment [2]).
analysis.faits: Méridian Studios seeks to establish the unauthorized exploitation of Bastille through the Quiz Mania by Julien Mercier / Cassiopée. A bailiff's report dated 02/10/2019 (Exhibit 6 Bis) has already been drawn up (webpage screenshot). The saisie-contrefaçon (infringement seizure) is identified as a supplementary tool (§4, framework C) to establish the exploitation volumes and the technical elements of the Quiz Mania, which are inaccessible through a simple bailiff's report. No document in the file currently evidences a […] order having been obtained or a procès-verbal of seizure having been duly served.
analysis.faille: Risk of nullity on two cumulative grounds if the seizure is conducted without precaution: (a) absence of documentary proof that the order was served separately from the procès-verbal — the bailiff's mere notation that the order was previously served on and read to the party subject to seizure is insufficient (Exhibit 11 [adverse party], TGI Paris 4 avril 2014; arrêt [1]); (b) presence during operations of a representative of Méridian Studios not expressly authorized by the order, constituting a substantive […] without any requirement to demonstrate prejudice (arrêts [1] and [2]); (c) collection of statements in the absence of prior discovery of infringing items on the premises (arrêt [2]).
analysis.riposte: Produce the separate service of process of the order with proof of delivery to the party subject to the saisie-contrefaçon (infringement seizure), predating or contemporaneous with the commencement of operations; demonstrate that only the bailiff and the expert designated in the order were present, with no representative of Méridian Studios; verify that the procès-verbal records statements only after infringing elements had been identified. If those conditions are met, decisions [1] and [2] of the Court of […] validate the regularity of the operations.

autorites.title: L332-1 — Code de la propriété intellectuelle
cc civ1 13-25.311 2015-03-19
themes: ordonnance faisant droit à la requête
delivrance à la personne à laquelle est opposée l'ordonnance
délivrance effectuée préalablement aux opérations de saisie
autorites.summary: Viole l'article L. 332-1 du code de la propriété intellectuelle dans sa […] applicable au litige et l'article 495 du code de procédure civile, l'arrêt […], pour annuler des opérations de saisie-contrefaçon, retient que l'absence de mention sur le procès-verbal de saisie-contrefaçon et sur l'acte de signification de l'ordonnance, de l'heure à laquelle ce dernier est intervenu, ne permet pas de vérifier si la notification a été effectuée préalablement aux opérations de saisie et si un délai suffisant a été laissé au saisi pour prendre connaissance de l'ordonnance, alors que l'acte de signification de l'ordonnance précisait que cette formalité avait eu lieu préalablement aux opérations de saisie-contrefaçon

autorites.title: cc civ1 14-11.853 2015-04-09
themes: contrefaçon dressé avec l'assistance d'un tiers sans indication de ses qualités et des liens de dépendance éventuels avec le requérant
contrefaçon avec recueil de déclarations en l'absence de découverte d'objets prétendument contrefaits ou de factures
autorites.summary: Ayant relevé, d'une part, s'agissant d'un […] procès-verbal de saisie-contrefaçon dressé dans les locaux d'une société, que l'huissier de justice avait effectué ses opérations avec l'assistance d'un tiers, sans indiquer ses qualités ni les liens de dépendance qu'il pouvait avoir vis-à-vis du requérant, d'autre part, s'agissant d'un […] procès-verbal de saisie-contrefaçon dressé dans les locaux d'une autre société, que bien qu'aucun objet prétendument contrefaisant ni aucune facture […] été découverts sur les lieux, l'huissier instrumentaire avait néanmoins recueilli les déclarations du directeur du site quant aux actes argués de contrefaçon, une cour d'appel, en a exactement déduit que lesdits procès-verbaux devaient être annulés sans avoir à caractériser l'existence d'un grief, de telles irrégularités constituant des […] de fond

analysis.acte_referme: Petition drafted with care expressly naming the designated technical expert (and that expert alone, without any representative of the petitioner); instrument of service of the order drawn up separately from the procès-verbal, with delivery of a certified true copy to the party subject to seizure before the commencement of operations, and […] to the procès-verbal; written instructions to the bailiff to collect statements only after infringing elements have been identified.
analysis.moyen_adverse: Cassiopée/Julien Mercier will raise the nullity of the procès-verbal of the saisie-contrefaçon (infringement seizure) on the ground of a substantive […]: absence of regular and separate service of the order (Exhibit 11 [adverse party]), and/or unauthorized presence of a representative of Méridian Studios during operations (Exhibit 18 [adverse party], CA Aix-en-Provence 15 septembre 2016), rendering inadmissible all items collected during the seizure.

statut_preuve.pourquoi: The saisie-contrefaçon (infringement seizure) has not yet been carried out: neither an ex parte order nor a seizure report appears in the dossier. The bailiff's report of 02/10/2019 (Exhibit 6 Bis) does not substitute for a saisie-contrefaçon and does not provide access to the technical and commercial data of Quiz Mania.

analysis.these_adverse: Cassiopée and Julien Mercier have at their disposal two decisions on the merits (Exhibit 11 [adverse party], TGI Paris 4 avril 2014; Exhibit 18 [adverse party], CA Aix-en-Provence 15 septembre 2016) establishing that the bailiff's mere recital of prior service is insufficient and that the presence of an unauthorized third party constitutes a substantive […] ground rendering the seizure void without any requirement to demonstrate prejudice. They will argue that, in the absence of a separate instrument of service filed with the court and absent any guarantee as to the composition of the seizure team, the procès-verbal is null and void and all materials collected must be excluded. This strategy is all the more formidable given that Méridian Studios has not yet conducted the seizure, affording the opposing party time to prepare its […] grounds for nullity.

pieces_adverses.piece: Adverse Exhibit 11 (TGI Paris, April 4, 2014): judgment annulling an infringement seizure [saisie-contrefaçon] for lack of a separate service instrument [acte de signification]
pieces_adverses.contre: Non-final first-instance decision predating the Cass. civ. 1re rulings of 2015 ([1]) […] which clarified the applicable rules; to be distinguished if Méridian Studios produces a separate, conforming service of process.

pieces_adverses.piece: Adverse Exhibit 18 (CA Aix-en-Provence, September 15, 2016): judgment annulling a seizure due to the unauthorized presence of the applicant
pieces_adverses.contre: Inapplicable if the order obtained by Méridian Studios authorizes only the bailiff and the designated expert, with no representative of the applicant — to be neutralized by strict compliance with Antoine Roux 3 of the application and scrupulous adherence to the composition of the team.

pieces_adverses.piece: Attestation or testimony from a Cassiopée employee present during the operations, alleging the presence of a Méridian Studios representative
pieces_adverses.contre: Probative value […] of an affidavit from an interested party; to be countered by the procès-verbal itself and the bailiff's attestation as to the exact composition of the team.

pieces_attendues: Ex parte order from the […] of the Tribunal Judiciaire authorizing the saisie-contrefaçon (infringement seizure) (with the bailiff and technical expert named individually)
Separate instrument of service of the order, dated and acknowledged by the party subject to seizure, predating or contemporaneous with the commencement of operations

Procès-verbal of the saisie-contrefaçon (infringement seizure) recording the absence of any unauthorized third party and the prior discovery of infringing elements before any statements were collected
Technical report of the expert designated […] to the procès-verbal, documenting the technical elements and exploitation volumes of the Quiz Mania
